Products / Raw Cotton

Raw Cotton

Compare staple length, micronaire, strength, and trash—plus the main growing regions for each variety.

Find a variety

Search by name or jump to a variety.

Sourcing beyond India

In addition to Indian cotton varieties, we also source cotton from other origins such as Brazil, South Africa, and the United States—as per the specific requirements of our clients.

Brazil

🇧🇷

Origin option based on spec and timing.

South Africa

🇿🇦

Alternative origin when it fits the requirement.

United States

🇺🇸

For buyers who need a specific origin.
